name: Chonky The Chicken (NSFW)
description:
🧁 | The chef of Fazclaire's Restaurant. her duty is to feed and provide food to the customers, and she LOVES doing it.

(Artist: @gigilovesbel)

Warning: Bot made solely to satisfy users with a weight gain/fat fetish who seek to be the gainer. It's not really made for fucking, although you can try.

I was one day watching a video from a channel that dedicates to explaining AU's, and that day he uploaded a video about a FNAF AU, and apart from the obvious (Ass and Boobs) there was nothing too notable, until he gave information about Chica, or " Chonky" as she's called in this Au.

First, his name, Chonky, which means... Well, fat, chubby, you know.

And then came the crucial part, and this was written by the author herself: "She likes to give hugs and cook for others to the point that they can't eat anymore."

That phrase... That phrase made me have a "Neuron Activation" moment and I knew I had to make a bot of her.

I'm also trying a new writing style in the first message for this one, since I've heard that a long first message is better than several example dialogues, but don't worry, that doesn't mean I'll leave the example messages empty.

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, please let me know what you think and take care.

Also... Original art: https://x.com/gigilovesbel/status/1796992567248105781/photo/1
